'''dhawungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reaccomplishment|reaccomplishment]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reaccomplishment|reaccomplishment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhawungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæwingith|dhæwingith]] || [[word:dhæwingij|dhæwingij]] || [[word:dhæwingish|dhæwingish]] || [[word:dhæwingi|dhæwingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhawuwunguth|dhawuwunguth]] || [[word:dhawuwunguj|dhawuwunguj]] || [[word:dhawuwungush|dhawuwungush]] || [[word:dhawuwungu|dhawuwungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhawunguth|dhawunguth]] || [[word:dhawunguj|dhawunguj]] || [[word:dhawungush|dhawungush]] || [[word:dhawungu|dhawungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhawufnguth|dhawufnguth]] || [[word:dhawufnguj|dhawufnguj]] || [[word:dhawufngush|dhawufngush]] || [[word:dhawufnguf|dhawufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhawunguthu|dhawunguthu]] || [[word:dhawunguju|dhawunguju]] || [[word:dhawungushu|dhawungushu]] || [[word:dhawunguku|dhawunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhawunguth|dhawunguth]] || [[word:dhawunguj|dhawunguj]] || [[word:dhawungush|dhawungush]] || [[word:dhawungu|dhawungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhawunguthul|dhawunguthul]] || [[word:dhawungujul|dhawungujul]] || [[word:dhawungushul|dhawungushul]] || [[word:dhawungukul|dhawungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhawunguthuthu|dhawunguthuthu]] || [[word:dhawungujuju|dhawungujuju]] || [[word:dhawungushushu|dhawungushushu]] || [[word:dhawunguku|dhawunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhawunguthun|dhawunguthun]] || [[word:dhawungujun|dhawungujun]] || [[word:dhawungushun|dhawungushun]] || [[word:dhawungukun|dhawungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhawunguthuoro|dhawunguthuoro]] || [[word:dhawungujuoro|dhawungujuoro]] || [[word:dhawungushuoro|dhawungushuoro]] || [[word:dhawungukuoro|dhawungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
